name: Tesla, Inc.
summary: Tesla, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and leases fully electric vehicles (Model 3, Y, S, X, Cybertruck, Semi) and energy generation and storage products (Powerwall, Megapack, Solar Roof, solar panels). The company also offers autonomous driving technology (FSD Supervised), a Robotaxi ride-hailing service, and is developing the Optimus humanoid robot. Tesla sells directly to consumers and operates two segments: automotive and energy generation and storage.

products.name: Model 3
products.description: Four-door mid-size electric sedan designed for manufacturability with mass-market base price.

products.name: Model Y
products.description: Compact electric SUV built on Model 3 platform with seating for up to seven adults.

products.name: Model S
products.description: Four-door full-size electric sedan with highest performance and longest range in sedan category.

products.name: Model X
products.description: Mid-size electric SUV with seating for up to seven adults and highest range in SUV category.

products.name: Cybertruck
products.description: Full-size electric pickup truck with stainless steel exterior combining truck utility with sports car speed.

products.name: Tesla Semi
products.description: Commercial fully electric vehicle; early production and deliveries began in 2022.

products.name: Cybercab
products.description: Purpose-built autonomous vehicle intended for use in the Robotaxi service.

products.name: Optimus
products.description: General purpose autonomous humanoid robot currently in development.

products.name: Full Self-Driving (FSD) (Supervised)
products.description: Advanced driver assistance and autonomous driving software delivered via over-the-air updates.

products.name: Robotaxi
products.description: Autonomous ride-hailing platform launched June 2025, currently operating with Model Y vehicles.

products.name: Powerwall
products.description: Lithium-ion battery energy storage product for homes or small commercial facilities; sold and leased.

products.name: Megapack
products.description: Large-scale lithium-ion energy storage solution for commercial, industrial, utility and energy generation customers.

products.name: Solar Roof
products.description: Premium glass roof tiles with integrated solar energy generation capability.

products.name: Solar Panels
products.description: Residential retrofit solar panel; new version manufactured in 2025 with initial deliveries in January 2026.

products.name: Autobidder
products.description: Real-time energy control and optimization platform for Megapack batteries.

products.name: Powerhub
products.description: Real-time energy control and optimization platform for distributed energy resources including Powerwall.

products.name: Cortex
products.description: AI training compute cluster located at Gigafactory Texas, expanded in 2025; Cortex 2 currently under construction.

products.name: Supercharger Network
products.description: Paid fast-charging network for Tesla vehicles; revenue included in automotive services segment.

products.description: Four-door mid-size fully electric sedan designed for manufacturability with mass-market base price.

products.description: Compact electric SUV built on Model 3 platform with seating for up to seven adults.

products.name: Full Self-Driving (FSD) (Supervised)
products.description: Advanced driver assistance and autonomous driving software updated via over-the-air updates; subscription available.

products.name: Robotaxi
products.description: Autonomous ride-hailing platform launched June 2025, currently operating with Model Y vehicles.

products.name: Powerwall
products.description: Lithium-ion battery energy storage product for homes or small commercial facilities; sold and leased.

products.name: Megapack
products.description: Large-scale lithium-ion energy storage solution for commercial, industrial, utility, and energy generation customers.

products.name: Solar Roof
products.description: Premium glass roof tiles combined with solar energy generation; designed to integrate with Powerwall.

products.name: Solar Panels
products.description: Residential retrofit solar panels; new version began manufacturing in 2025 with initial deliveries in January 2026.

products.name: Autobidder

products.name: Cortex

partnerships.description: Collaboration to manufacture advanced semiconductors for AI inference and training in the U.S.
Collaboration announced in 2025 to manufacture advanced semiconductors for AI inference and training in the U.S.
